title: Public School Nutrition Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To improve nutritional standards and grant support for K-12 school meals. SEC. 1 establishes updated sodium and sugar limits. SEC. 2 authorizes grants for kitchen modernization and nutrition education.

title: Grid Resilience and Storage Deployment Act
bill_text: A BILL To improve electric grid reliability through transmission upgrades and utility-scale battery storage grants. The Secretary of Energy shall administer competitive grants for state and regional projects.

title: Community Health Clinic Expansion Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide funding to expand community health centers in medically underserved areas and increase telehealth reimbursement for primary care services.

title: Federal Procurement Transparency Act
bill_text: A BILL To require publication of federal procurement contracts, subcontracting reports, and performance metrics in a centralized public dashboard.

title: Watershed Restoration and Flood Mitigation Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund watershed restoration, wetland rehabilitation, and local flood mitigation projects through EPA and Army Corps coordination.

title: Veterans Mental Health Access Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand mental health counseling, crisis support, and telehealth access for veterans through the Department of Veterans Affairs.

title: Regional Rail Safety and Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To upgrade rail signal systems, improve inspection standards, and support rail corridor safety modernization grants.

title: Small Business Cybersecurity Support Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide cybersecurity training, incident response grants, and vulnerability assessment support for small businesses.

title: Clean Drinking Water Infrastructure Act
bill_text: A BILL To replace lead service lines, upgrade municipal water treatment systems, and support safe drinking water infrastructure.

title: Childcare Workforce Stabilization Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund childcare provider retention grants, workforce training, and facility improvement incentives for early learning programs.
